title: Legacy Jenkins CI/CD static credentials
compensating_controls: Key rotation every 90 days with old key disabled within 7 days of rotation; IP restriction to Jenkins server CIDR 10.0.5.0/24; PowerUserAccess scoped via permission boundary to ci-cd resources only; weekly key usage audit via CloudTrail
review_outcome: Renewed — rotation schedule verified. Extended to 2026-04-01.

title: Datadog APM agent static API key
compensating_controls: IP restriction to monitoring VPC 10.0.8.0/24; IAM policy scoped to CloudWatchReadOnlyAccess and AWSXRayReadOnlyAccess only; weekly key usage audit; Datadog agent does not support OIDC federation
review_outcome: Renewed — compensating controls verified. Read-only scope confirmed. Extended to 2026-04-01.

title: Root account password rotation exemption
compensating_controls: Root account MFA with hardware YubiKey; root access restricted to break-glass scenarios only; all root usage triggers immediate SOC alert; quarterly root activity review by CISO
review_outcome: Renewed — zero root logins in review period. Extended to 2026-01-20.
